title: hoffmannia triosteoides subsp. costensis
intro: Hoffmannia triosteoides subsp. costensis is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to Costa Rica. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hoffmannia triosteoides subsp. costensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Hoffmannia triosteoides subsp. costensis is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
